name: Bacon Cheddar Muffins
recipeIngredient: 6 slice Bacon, crisp-cooked, drained and crumbled (about 1/3 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 8 muffin cups and the top surface of a baking pan.
3. Set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, stir together flour, cheddar cheese, sugar, baking powder, and red pepper.
5. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
6. In a small mixing bowl, stir together egg, milk, and cooking oil.
7. Add this mixture to the flour mixture all at once.
8. Stir until just moistened (batter should be lumpy).
9. Fold in crumbled bacon.
10. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups so that it is evenly distributed with the top of the pan.
11. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Let stand for 2-5 minutes in the cups before removing the muffins and serving warm.
